specification.sheet: Chassis! Type II Pantone 433 anodised aluminium! Finish: Sand blasted+ Material: 6061 Aluminium$ Display! 13.4-inch (diagonal) LED-backlit display with IPS technology+ 2520x1680 resolution at 226 pixels per inch+ 90Hz Refresh Rate+ 3:2 aspect ratio+ Pre-installed Privacy Screen Protector! Brightness: 500cd/m²+ Type: IPS+ Dimming: PWM (10kHz)+ Colours: 1064.3M (8bit:2FRC)+ Colour Depth (NTSC): 71%+ Colour Depth (sRGB): 100%+ Contrast Ratio: 1500:1+ Haze: 0%+ Coating: 3H Hard Coat$ Processor! 1.00GHz 8-core Intel i3-N305+ Turbo Boost up to 3.80GHz, with 6MB Smart Cache! 8 Cores+ 8 Threads+ 15W TDP+ 50W PL2$ Storage! 2TB Gen3 PCIe SSD! Read Speed (CDM): 3370MB/s+ Write Speed (CDM): 3030MB/s+ Key Type: M+ Size: M2 2280+ Design: Single-Sided$ Firmware! coreboot+ Configurable options$ Security Features! Hardware-backed disk encryption (Opal 2.0)+ BIOS Lock+ Secure Boot+ Measured Boot+ TPM 2.0+ Disabled Intel Management Engine! TPM 2.0: Infineon OPTIGA™ SLB9670$ Memory! 32GB of 4800MT/s LPDDR5X onboard memory+ In-Band ECC: Supported$ Graphics! Intel® UHD Graphics+ 1.35GHz Frequency$ Connectivity! Left+ HDMI+ 2x USB Type-C (10 Gbps)! HDMI Version: 2.1+ USB-C version: 3.2 Gen 2+ USB-C Interface: DisplayPort (DP Alt Mode)+ Power Delivery: 3.0! Right+ USB Type-A 3.2 Gen 2 (up to 10Gbps)+ USB Type-C 3.2 Gen 2 (up to 10Gbps)+ 3.5mm Combination Jack! 3.5mm support: Headphone/Microphone+ Right USB-C Interface: data only (no DisplayPort Alt Mode or Power Delivery)+ USB version: 3.2 Gen 2 (up to 10 Gbps)$ Keyboard and Trackpad! Backlit keyboard+ Glass trackpad for precise cursor control and Multi-Touch gestures$ Wireless! Intel Wi-Fi 6E AX211+ Hardware Kill Switch! 802.11ax Wi-Fi; Up to 2.4 Gbps+ 802.11ac/a/b/g/n compatible$ Bluetooth! Bluetooth 5.3$ Camera! 1080p camera+ Physical Webcam Cover$ Video Support! Simultaneously supports full native resolution on the built-in display and:+ Up to two displays with 3840x2160 resolution at 30Hz! Up to 3840x2160 resolution at 60Hz using HDMI+ Up to 3840x2160 resolution at 30Hz using Display Port$ Audio! Stereo Speakers+ Dual Digital Microphone$ Embedded Controller! ITE 5570E$ Battery and Power! Up to 14 hours battery life+ 45-watt-hour user-replaceable lithium-ion battery+ 65w USB-C Power Adapter! Technology: Power Delivery 3.0$ Operating Requirements! Line voltage: 100V to 240V AC+ Frequency: 50Hz to 60Hz+ Operating temperature: 5° to 40° C (41° to 104° F)+ Storage temperature: -20° to 60° C (-4° to 140° F)+ Relative humidity: 30% to 65% non-condensing+ Operating altitude: tested up to 3048 metres (10000 feet)+ Maximum storage altitude: 12192 metres (40000 feet)+ Maximum shipping altitude: 12192 metres (40000 feet)$ Size and Weight! Height: 1.5 cm (0.59 inches)+ Width: 29.5 cm (11.61 inches)+ Depth: 21.9 cm (8.62 inches)+ Weight: 1.1 kg (2.42 pounds)$ Operating System! Distributions using Linux 6.2 or later+ Windows 11 22H1 (64-bit) or later$ What's in the Box! 13.4-inch StarBook Horizon+ Pre-installed Privacy Screen Protector+ 65W USB‑C Power Adapter+ USB-C to USB-C Charging Cable (2m)+ Detachable plug (UK, EU, US and AU available)! Quick Start Guide+ Protective Sleeve+ Screen Cleaning Cloth$ Limited Warranty and Service! One-year limited warranty+ One-year limited technical support
